title: [supervisor] Execute shared envctl loop-state gates repair lane
objective: Fix: Create and run the shared `repair-envctl-loop-state-gates` lane for FlexNetOS/envctl#284 and #281, inspect both gates logs, repair the common `.handoff/loop/plan/loop_state.md` cycle_budget failure or prove the PRs must split, then push, watch CI, and merge/automerge or record an evidenced blocker.
acceptance_criteria: A `rtk meta git worktree create repair-envctl-loop-state-gates --repo envctl --from-pr FlexNetOS/envctl#284 --ttl 24h --meta incident=envctl-loop-state-gates-2026-06-27 --json` lane is created or an equivalent current lane is proven.
Both envctl#284 and envctl#281 gates logs are inspected and the shared vs split decision is recorded in `.handoff/pr-repair/incidents/envctl-loop-state-gates-2026-06-27.md` or a successor artifact.
If a fix is made, the envctl branch(es) are committed, pushed, PR-updated, and required CI gates are green or auto-merge is armed.
If blocked, the blocker includes exact command/log evidence and the next action; no blind retry loop remains.
